item.title: Photon Queue Raises $4 MillionOversubscribed Seed Round
item.summary: Insider Brief PRESS RELEASE — Photon Queue, a quantum technology company building high-efficiency quantum memories for next-generation quantum computing systems, today announced the close of its oversubscribed seed funding round of $4 million, led by Playground Global. The seed round builds on Photon Queue’s early customer traction, including contracts with Sandia National Laboratories and the […]
